description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box labeled 'Velocity' and designed to contain ammunition. The front and back faces feature a stylized logo, a graphic of a rifle cartridge, and the text 'High-Powered Ammunition' along with the number '20', indicating the quantity inside. The side panels are decorated with horizontal black stripes on a blue background, with one side displaying a product description and a gray square, possibly representing a window or label area. The box has a slightly textured, matte blue finish with black and gray accents. The overall appearance suggests it is a commercial retail package for bullets, likely found in gun shops, sporting goods stores, or garages. The box is compact and lightweight, suitable for easy handling and storage.
description: A blue, rectangular cardboard box labeled 'Velocity' for high-powered ammunition, featuring a bullet graphic and product details. The box has black stripes on the sides and a matte, slightly textured finish.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the box with the 'Velocity' logo, horizontal black stripes, a product description, and a gray square label area.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the box with the 'Velocity' logo, a large bullet graphic, 'High-Powered Ammunition', and the number '20'.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite side panel, featuring only the 'Velocity' logo and horizontal black stripes on a blue background.
description_view_3: This view is nearly identical to view 1, showing the front face with the bullet graphic, 'Velocity' logo, and product details.
